text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a great showing at the Satsuki Sho under her
belt, Eishin Flash eagerly sets her sights on the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her difference in reputation to the
other racers hasn't changed. To remedy this, she
comes up with a plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to build experience by running weekly
scrimmages that replicate the intensity of the
Derby, but the burden on her body would be
enormous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, it falls on me to find a less taxing way for
her to obtain the firsthand experience she seeks.
